title: aeschynomene evenia var. serrulata
intro: Aeschynomene evenia var. serrulata, also known as the serrated sensitive plant, is a plant species in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever and relieve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. The leaves and stems of Aeschynomene evenia var. serrulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
